decisions.summary: Implemented a shared dashboard HarnessSelect/ModelHarnessPicker surface and threaded harness values through planning and work-agent start endpoints using the existing pan start --harness support.
Persisted per-work-type harness overrides alongside model overrides as models.harness_overrides so settings round-trip model and harness choices together.
Fixed postMergeLifecycle verification to tolerate removed source refs after merge cleanup; the previous behavior broke the full test suite when no branch ref remained.
Fixed CLI build prompt-copy root cause after pan inspect could not find dist/cli/prompts/inspect-agent.md; build-cli now copies prompt templates to both dist/prompts and dist/cli/prompts.

Review-response fixes now derive Anthropic auth mode from /api/settings/claude-auth on picker surfaces and from getClaudeAuthStatus() on backend spawn paths, so Pi is blocked only for Anthropic subscription auth and allowed for Anthropic API-key auth.
Conversation and fork flows now persist the selected harness in SQLite and respawn via the selected runtime instead of silently falling back to Claude Code.
Review-response follow-up now exposes canonical harness policy through /api/settings/harness-policy and uses it in frontend pickers instead of duplicating Pi ToS logic client-side.
Work-agent resume/restart and conversation restart-all now resolve and pass persisted harness values, preserving Pi sessions where policy allows them.

Resolved latest review blockers by calculating effective work-agent harness before Docker-delayed starts, enforcing planning harness policy after final model resolution, and replacing the Settings override native select with shared HarnessSelect.

Resolved review verification and latest review blockers: updated checkpoint reconciliation test mocks for per-agent checkpoint APIs, preserved conversation harness on model-only switch requests, cached harness-policy auth mode by provider per request, invalidated available-model cache after settings/OpenRouter changes, and optimized OpenRouter favorites filtering with a Set.

Resolved IssueAgentCard review blocker by adding the shared ModelHarnessPicker to the stopped-agent start flow and sending the selected harness with the /api/agents request; also optimized chat OpenRouter favorites filtering with a Set.
Resolved ForkModal model-only selector blocker by replacing the summary ModelSelect with ModelHarnessPicker and threading summaryHarness through the fork request path for policy validation.

Resolved latest review blockers by forcing conversation harness resolution to claude-code when no concrete model is available, threading summaryHarness into fork summary generation so Pi launches use the Pi runtime, and initializing PlanDialog from models.harness_overrides[planning-agent].

hazards.summary: Frontend tests that mock chat ModelPicker or fetch strictly need to include the new harness helpers and /api/settings/claude-auth call.
hazards.mitigation: Updated affected CommandDeck and ComposerFooter tests; full npm test now passes.

resumePoint.description: Fixed latest CHANGES_REQUESTED blockers: conversation create/resume/switch no longer persist Pi without a concrete model, summary fork generation now receives and uses summaryHarness, and planning kickoff initializes harness from the saved planning-agent override. typecheck and lint pass; full npm test had one unrelated flake that passed when targeted and should be rerun before submit.

sessionHistory.note: Added shared harness picker primitives, surfaced harness in planning/settings flows, passed harness through start endpoints, added settings round-trip support, fixed unrelated post-merge lifecycle test failure, and verified typecheck/lint/npm test pass.
Committed bead workspace-xgc6 as 2497e06cc after typecheck, lint, and npm test passed.
pan inspect failed because build-cli did not populate dist/cli/prompts; fixed build script and rebuilt CLI locally.
Inspection passed for workspace-xgc6. Reran npm test after build-cli fix; 375 test files / 4570 tests passed.

Addressed review blockers: added missing harness selectors and launch payloads for conversation/fork/fresh agent flows, persisted conversation harness, applied canonical Pi policy in planning/work/conversation spawns, restored PAN-1055 vBRIEF, and added Vitest coverage for Pi ToS gating plus settings harness round-trip. npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test passed (377 files / 4584 tests).

Fixed latest CHANGES_REQUESTED blockers: preserved persisted harness across work-agent resume/restart and conversation restart-all, added canonical harness policy route and frontend policy cache, added harness selectors to conversation/switch/start flows, updated tests. npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test passed (377 files / 4584 tests).

pan done reported a rebase conflict in src/lib/cloister/merge-agent.ts. Merged origin/main, kept the origin/main rev-parse handling with the existing lifecycle verification flow, then reran npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test (378 files / 4595 tests passed).
Fixed remaining harness picker review blockers: persisted harness across resume/restart paths, canonicalized frontend harness policy, and added missing combined picker flows.
Fixed frontend-typecheck failures reported in .pan/feedback/002-verification-gate-failed.md and verified with npm run typecheck.
Fixed frontend-typecheck by exporting harness picker policy types and adding frontend agent harness metadata.

Fixed frontend-typecheck failures from .pan/feedback/003-verification-gate-failed.md by converting agent.runtime fallback to Harness literals for SwitchModelModal currentHarness. Verified with npm run typecheck.

Fixed review blockers for Docker-delayed harness preservation, planning policy enforcement after default/settings model resolution, and Settings shared picker usage. Also capped harness-policy request size. Verified npm run typecheck, npm run lint, targeted harness tests, and npm test (378 files / 4595 tests passed).

Fixed review verification test failure plus blockers for conversation switch harness persistence and harness-policy provider auth caching. Addressed high-priority cache freshness and OpenRouter favorite filtering. Verified typecheck, lint, targeted tests, and full npm test (378 files / 4595 tests passed).

Fixed review verification and remaining harness blockers: model-only conversation switches preserve persisted harness, harness policy caches auth by provider, model picker cache invalidates after settings changes, and checkpoint reconciliation tests match per-agent APIs.
Re-ran full test suite for verification; no code changes required because local tests pass cleanly.

Added shared ModelHarnessPicker to IssueAgentCard stopped-agent start flow and included harness in /api/agents payload. Optimized chat ModelPicker OpenRouter favorites filtering with Set. Verified npm run typecheck, npm run lint, targeted tests, and full npm test (378 files / 4595 tests passed).

Replaced ForkModal summary ModelSelect with ModelHarnessPicker and threaded summaryHarness through frontend fork submit and server summary-fork validation. Verified npm run typecheck, npm run lint, targeted fork/picker tests, and full npm test (378 files / 4595 tests passed).

Fixed three latest review blockers for harness launch-state consistency, fork summary runtime selection, and saved planning-agent harness override. npm run typecheck and npm run lint pass; full npm test encountered one deep-wipe test flake that passed when rerun targeted.
